step_rationale: IL-6 trans-signaling co-receptor driving pro-inflammatory monocyte recruitment and plaque destabilization.
mechanism: gp130 transduces IL-6 trans-signaling, amplifying monocyte recruitment and atherosclerotic inflammation.

references.title: Circulating soluble IL-6 receptor associates with plaque inflammation but not with atherosclerosis severity and cardiovascular risk.
The Inflammasome Signaling Pathway Is Actively Regulated and Related to Myocardial Damage in Coronary Thrombi from Patients with STEMI.
Interleukin-6 "Trans-Signaling" and Ischemic Vascular Disease: The Important Role of Soluble gp130.
